editorial_accuracy.notes: 46 evidence tier blocks across 26/29 chapters (up from 12). Verified/Circumstantial/Disputed classifications with source-backed summaries. 29 malformed source IDs fixed across 9 chapters.

information_design.notes: No regression. Bot meta injection covers all 31 chapters. Sources page search + jump nav. JSON-LD, OG, Twitter Cards.

ui_ux_typography.notes: Evidence tier blocks now render with colored indicators across 26 chapters. Improved content credibility signals.

code_quality.notes: Zero TS errors. Clean build. All evidence blocks follow ContentBlockRenderer schema.

accessibility.notes: No regression. Evidence blocks use semantic HTML with ARIA roles.

security.notes: No regressions. No new attack surface.

run9_summary.focus: Evidence tier system expansion and source ID integrity
changes: Added 46 proper evidence blocks across 26 chapters (was 12)
Fixed 29 malformed source IDs in 9 chapters
